programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An explosive confrontation ends with the California deputy attorney general removed from court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant makes a serious threat in court; a teen makes a desperate attempt to escape.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A dozen courthouse security guards attempt to subdue an enraged man.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A murder suspect and his tiger flee from police; a violent offender attacks his attorney.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Devastated family members seek justice in court-by any means necessary.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A look at the top five accused killers featured on the series.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A prosecutor strongly disagrees with what he feels is an unreasonable sentence from the judge.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge describes an affair with a defendant; a murderous sibling rivalry explodes in court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Tempers flare at the trial of a deadly biker brawl; a father faces his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A mother asks the judge to sterilize her murderous daughter; a tourist is in trouble and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A reality TV star breaks down crying; a grandma makes a scene in the courtroom.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant claims the pants he was wearing and the drug paraphernalia inside them weren't his.

programme.desc: A grieving man jumps over the gallery railing and goes after his brother's killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A man is shot dead outside his home; a man and a woman are caught on camera committing a murder.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Late-night shooting; a party turns into a bloodbath; carjackers become suspects in a murder.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A man is robbed and shot on his payday; a feud between neighbors gets out of control.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A woman is beaten and stabbed to death in her home in an act of vengeance.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Atlanta detectives need a witness to break the code of silence surrounding a fatal shooting.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: New Orleans Detective Ryan Vaught takes on his most challenging case yet.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young father is abducted and shot in the street.
